methodology: Direct git log queries against main branch, cross-referenced with commit-eras.json claims

discrepancies.actual: 294 commits through Apr 1 is correct. Main now has 301 (7 more on Apr 2). The 294 figure was accurate at time of generation.
discrepancies.fix: No fix needed. Update to 301 if including Apr 2 commits.

discrepancies.actual: Feb 28 to Apr 1 inclusive is 33 days (not 32). Feb has 28 days in 2026, so: Feb 28 (1) + Mar 1-31 (31) + Apr 1 (1) = 33 days.
discrepancies.fix: Change to '33 days' or use exclusive-end convention '32 days (Feb 28 through Apr 1, exclusive end)'.

discrepancies.actual: Exact match through Apr 1 (229 + 63 + 1 + 1 = 294). Simon now has 236 with 7 more Apr 2 commits.
discrepancies.fix: No fix needed for the 294-commit snapshot.

discrepancies.claim: Era 1 key_events: 'Kai agent runs 27 task-jobs building full architecture'
discrepancies.actual: There are 29 total task-job commits (25 on Feb 28, 4 on Mar 1). The key_events says 27 but the description says 29. The description is correct.
discrepancies.fix: Change key_events from '27 task-jobs' to '29 task-jobs' to match the description and actual count.

discrepancies.actual: 12 [A]-tagged commits in the 00:29-00:35 burst (6 min 7 sec). Total [A] commits on Mar 19 = 15, but 3 of those (at 10:26, 11:32, 14:02) are hours later, not in the burst.
discrepancies.fix: Change to '12 [A]-tagged commits in 6-minute burst (00:29-00:35), plus 3 more [A] commits later that day (10:26, 11:32, 14:02)'

discrepancies.actual: Mar 22 = 45 (correct). Apr 1 = 44 (correct). All daily counts match exactly through Apr 1.
Mar 21 has 9 commits, not 14. The claim of 14 is incorrect.
Mar 1 has 8 commits (verified by git log --format). The claim of 9 is off by 1.

discrepancies.claim: commit_types: feat 145, fix 50, docs 30, chore 14, refactor 7, test 4, perf 1, security 1, other 42
discrepancies.actual: All exact match through commit 294 (Apr 1). Sum: 145+50+30+14+7+4+1+1+42 = 294. Correct.

Confirmed: zero commits on Mar 24, 25, 26, 27 in git log. The CSV shows one liminal commit dated 2026-03-24 UTC (commit 'feat: upgrade swarm personas' at 2026-03-23 18:09 local = 2026-03-24 01:09 UTC), but that commit is on Mar 23 in local time.
discrepancies.fix: No fix needed. The CSV uses UTC timestamps which can shift by timezone. The local-date silence is correct.

discrepancies.actual: CSV has 7060 lines (7059 data rows + 1 header). 50 unique repos. 294 liminal rows. All claims correct.

era_verification.name: The Seed
era_verification.actual_range: commits 1-43 (34 on Feb 28, 8 on Mar 1, 1 on Mar 7)
era_verification.notes: Commit 43 is dated Mar 7, not Mar 1. The claimed dates 'Feb 28 - Mar 1' miss the lone Mar 7 commit at the end of Era 1. Severity: minor.

era_verification.name: The Explosion
era_verification.notes: 23 commits, all on Mar 19. Exact match.

era_verification.name: The Great Consolidation
era_verification.notes: 28 commits, all on Mar 20. Exact match.

era_verification.name: Quality Crusade
era_verification.notes: 30 commits (9 Mar 21 + 21 Mar 22). Exact match. Note: Mar 22 is split with Era 5 (Era 4 ends at 16:58, Era 5 starts at 19:32).

era_verification.name: THE BIBLE
era_verification.notes: 44 commits, all on Apr 1. Exact match.

summary.overall_accuracy: High. All era commit counts are exact. All date ranges match except Era 1 (Mar 7 edge case). Three moderate issues: [A]-burst count inflated from 12 to 15 in key_events, task-job count inconsistent (27 vs 29) within the same file, and Mar 21 daily count wrong (14 vs actual 9). Minor issues: lifespan off by 1 day (32 vs 33), Mar 1 daily count off by 1 (9 vs 8).
